summary: End-to-end test of Garage Calendar Sync (iCal feed). Backend: 9/9 new calendar tests pass + 9/9 prior regression (booking flow) re-passes. Frontend: Garage Console now renders 4 tabs (Availability, Bookings, Calendar Sync, Profile); Calendar Sync tab renders the absolute feed URL (origin + feed_path), all 4 action buttons (Copy, Google add, Apple webcal, Download .ics), Regenerate button, and all 3 HowTo cards. Regenerate flow verified end-to-end: old URL → 404, new URL → 200 text/calendar with BEGIN:VCALENDAR.

issues:
React hydration console warning: '<%s> cannot be a child of <%s>' on initial render — appears unrelated to Calendar Sync (likely a

wrapping a /block in another component, not introduced this iteration). Doesn't block functionality but is worth a sweep.

action_items:
(Optional, polish) Investigate the React hydration warning on /garage — likely a misplaced inline element inside a

tag in a sibling component.
critical_code_review_comments: Calendar Sync implementation is correct: token rotation on regenerate is atomic ($set on garages doc), and ICS endpoint enforces token equality before any data is returned — wrong/missing token correctly 404s without leaking garage existence.

_build_ics_for_garage iterates ALL bookings (confirmed + cancelled) — matches the documented intent so subscribers receive cancellation updates. Verified via re-book test: prior booking shows STATUS:CANCELLED and new one STATUS:CONFIRMED.
_serialize_garage(public=True) correctly strips calendar_feed_token AND calendar_url from /api/garages public listing (verified).
Front end builds the absolute URL via window.location.origin + feed_path — this dodges the internal ingress hostname issue cleanly. Good architectural choice.
Minor: feed_path is constructed as a string literal with '?token=' — if a token ever contains a URL-special char it could break, but secrets.token_urlsafe is URL-safe so this is fine in practice.
Minor: Apple webcal link uses simple regex replace; works because httpsUrl always starts with 'https://'.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Calendar Sync tab + regenerate flow + 404 verification all green)

test_credentials: Founder admin: founder@thecollectivesavers.co.uk / SaversCollective. Garage user seeded ad-hoc via mongosh + POST /api/garages/apply, then is_active/is_verified flipped via mongosh.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates its own TEST_-prefixed garage and (for booking tests) a TEST_TyreWaveCal_* VPP via the founder admin, plus an ephemeral consumer. Unique uuid suffixes mean no cleanup required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_garage_calendar_sync.py for any future calendar-related regression. The hydration warning on /garage is the only soft finding worth investigating. Frontend cookie auth in playwright works fine when you (a) seed user+session in mongo then (b) add cookie via page.context.add_cookies with domain=party-power-1.preview.emergentagent.com and secure=true. For HTTP-from-script use `requests`, not urllib — urllib's default UA gets 403'd by the ingress.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found in scope. Feature works end-to-end.
